rationale: This is a Gardenscapes-style 3D fail-skit hook with no card, stacking, or sorting cue — it has zero mechanical bridge to a classic solitaire core loop and would mislead-install at best. Visually it clashes hard: blue/green/white character-driven 3D render vs. the game's flat 2D casino-green, character-free, card-forward DNA. Casual adult overlap exists in theory, but without a believable solitaire payoff in the back half of the ad, IPM and retention will collapse — recommend skipping unless reworked into a "save the cat / solve the board" solitaire fail-puzzle variant.
